name: Peanut Butter Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the peanut butter and powdered sugar together until well combined.
2. Gradually add the dry powdered milk, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
3. Add the melted butter and vanilla extract, stirring until a dough-like consistency is achieved.
4. Press the mixture into a greased pan or baking dish.
5. Cut into squares or roll into balls once cooled and set aside to firm up.
